argDefs.description: The filter used to limit results. Can either be an encoded query as specified by ForceCom, or a Record example object.

argDefs.name: record
argDefs.description: A Record object containing the fields you want to save. If 'Id' is set, an update will be performed, otherwise a create will be performed.

actionDefs.name: saveForceComRecords

argDefs.name: records
argDefs.description: An array of Record objects containing the fields you want to save. If 'Id' is set for a given Record, an update will be performed, otherwise a create will be performed.

argDefs.description: the remote host name, address, or s3 [<region-or-endpoint>:]<bucket-name>

argDefs.name: port
argDefs.description: the remote port (default: depends on protocol)

argDefs.name: basePath
argDefs.description: the path to the base of the filesystem

argDefs.name: extraProperties
argDefs.description: object or Record containing extra configuration properties to customize the connection

actionDefs.name: deleteFile
actionDefs.description: Delete a file or directory.

argDefs.name: filesystem
argDefs.description: the filesystem definition to use (default: Connect server managed files)

actionDefs.name: getFileExtension
actionDefs.description: Get the extension from a file name or file path.

actionDefs.name: getFileName
actionDefs.description: Get the name from a file path.

actionDefs.name: getFileParentDirectory
actionDefs.description: Get the parent directory path from a file path

actionDefs.name: getFileSize
actionDefs.description: Gets the file size in bytes.

argDefs.name: filesystem
argDefs.description: the filesystem definition to use (default: Connect server managed files)

actionDefs.name: getFileTimestamp
actionDefs.description: Get the file timestamp.

argDefs.name: filesystem
argDefs.description: the filesystem definition to use (default: Connect server managed files)

actionDefs.name: isDirectory
actionDefs.description: Test if a path is a directory.

argDefs.name: filesystem
argDefs.description: the filesystem definition to use (default: Connect server managed files)

actionDefs.name: isFile
actionDefs.description: Test if a path is a file.

argDefs.name: filesystem
argDefs.description: the filesystem definition to use (default: Connect server managed files)

actionDefs.name: listFiles
actionDefs.description: List the files in a directory.

argDefs.name: filesystem
argDefs.description: the filesystem definition to use (default: Connect server managed files)

actionDefs.name: loadFileAsBytes
actionDefs.description: Load the contents of a file as byte array.

argDefs.name: filesystem
argDefs.description: the filesystem definition to use (default: Connect server managed files)

actionDefs.name: loadFileAsString
actionDefs.description: Load the contents of a file as a string.

argDefs.name: filesystem
argDefs.description: the filesystem definition to use (default: Connect server managed files)

argDefs.name: encoding
argDefs.description: The character encoding of the file. (default: ISO-8859-1)

actionDefs.name: loadFileAsXML
actionDefs.description: Load the contents of a file as XML.

argDefs.name: filesystem
argDefs.description: the filesystem definition to use (default: Connect server managed files)

actionDefs.name: moveFile
actionDefs.description: Move and/or rename a file or directory.

argDefs.name: srcFilesystem
argDefs.description: the source filesystem definition to use (default: Connect server managed files)

argDefs.name: srcPath
argDefs.description: The path of the source file or directory.

argDefs.name: destFilesystem
argDefs.description: the destination filesystem definition to use (default: Connect server managed files)

argDefs.name: destPath
argDefs.description: the path of the destination file or directory

actionDefs.name: saveToFile
actionDefs.description: Save to a file.

argDefs.name: filesystem
argDefs.description: the filesystem definition to use (default: Connect server managed files)

argDefs.name: value
argDefs.description: value to save to the file

argDefs.name: encoding
argDefs.description: the character encoding of the file (default: UTF8 for XML, ISO-8859-1 for string)(ignored if value is a byte array)

actionDefs.name: setSMBFileACE
actionDefs.description: Set Access Control Entry (ACE) to a file/directory on an SMB/CIFS file system, replacing any existing ACE for the given principal.

argDefs.name: smbFilesystem
argDefs.description: the filesystem definition to use (must be SMB/CIFS filesystem)

argDefs.name: path
argDefs.description: the path of the target file or directory

argDefs.name: principal
argDefs.description: the User or Group to which the ACE applies

argDefs.name: containerInherit
argDefs.description: the ACE will be inherited by directories

argDefs.name: objectInherit
argDefs.description: the ACE will be inherited by files

argDefs.name: inheritOnly
argDefs.description: the ACE does not apply to the current file/directory

argDefs.name: noPropagateInherit
argDefs.description: the ACE does not propagate inheritance

actionDefs.name: unzipFile
actionDefs.description: Extract the contents of a ZIP archive.

argDefs.name: zipFilesystem
argDefs.description: the filesystem definition to use for the destination zip file (default: Connect server managed files)

argDefs.name: zipPath
argDefs.description: the path of the zip file

argDefs.name: destFilesystem
argDefs.description: the destination filesystem definition to use (default: Connect server managed files)

argDefs.name: destDir
argDefs.description: the path of the directory to receive the extracted files

actionDefs.name: zipFile
actionDefs.description: Create a ZIP archive from a file or directory.

argDefs.name: srcFilesystem
argDefs.description: the source filesystem definition to use (default: Connect server managed files)

argDefs.name: srcPath
argDefs.description: the path or array of paths to the files or directories to add the the ZIP file

argDefs.name: zipFilesystem
argDefs.description: the filesystem definition to use for the destination zip file (default: Connect server managed files)

argDefs.name: zipPath
argDefs.description: the path of the zip file

argDefs.name: compressionLevel
argDefs.description: the level of compression to use (0-9)

actionDefs.name: log
actionDefs.description: Write a message to the log.

argDefs.name: color
argDefs.description: the message color (any legal html color specification)(default: depends on level

actionDefs.name: logAuditEvent
actionDefs.description: Write an event to the audit log, returning the automatically generated event unique id on success.

argDefs.name: groupID
argDefs.description: id used for grouping individual events together as one logical event (default: the automatically generated event unique id)

argDefs.name: targetSystem
argDefs.description: the target system of the action (default: none)

argDefs.name: targetID
argDefs.description: the ID of the target object of the action (default: none)

argDefs.name: target
argDefs.description: the name of the target object of the action (default: none)

argDefs.name: perpetratorID
argDefs.description: the ID of the perpetrator of the action (default: none)

argDefs.name: perpetratorDN
argDefs.description: the DN of the perpetrator of the action (default: none)

argDefs.name: extendedProperties
argDefs.description: Record or object containing addition key/value pairs to be logged (default: none)

actionDefs.name: defineSyslogConnection
actionDefs.description: Create a connection to a Syslog server.

argDefs.name: host
argDefs.description: Syslog server host name or address (default: localhost)

actionDefs.name: sendSyslog
actionDefs.description: Send a Syslog message.

actionDefs.name: createRESTPointResponse
actionDefs.description: Create a new RESTPoint Response.

argDefs.name: data
argDefs.description: the content data of the HTTP response (default: empty content)

argDefs.name: contentType
argDefs.description: the MIME type of the data (default: whatever is defined by the RESTPoint)

argDefs.name: headers
argDefs.description: Record or Object containing HTTP header fields

argDefs.name: cookies
argDefs.description: Record or Object containing HTTP cookies

actionDefs.name: getHostName
actionDefs.description: Gets the hostname of the server hosting the current process.

actionDefs.name: getIPAddress
actionDefs.description: Gets the IP address of the server hosting the current process.

actionDefs.name: getIdBridgeConnectInfo
actionDefs.description: Gets the host and port for a particular Identity Bridge.

argDefs.name: name
argDefs.description: The name of the Identity Bridge

actionDefs.name: readURL
actionDefs.description: Read the contents of a URL.

actionDefs.name: closeForwardedLocalPort
actionDefs.description: Close a forwarded a local TCP port.

argDefs.name: localAddress
argDefs.description: the bound local source IP address(default: 127.0.0.1, i.e. localhost of Connect server)

argDefs.name: localPort
argDefs.description: the forwarded local source TCP port

actionDefs.name: closeForwardedRemotePort
actionDefs.description: Close a forwarded a remote TCP port

argDefs.name: remotePort
argDefs.description: the forwarded remote source TCP port

actionDefs.name: forwardLocalPort
actionDefs.description: Forward a TCP port on the Connect server through a remote CLI connection to a TCP port on a remote server.

argDefs.name: localAddress
argDefs.description: the local source IP address (default: 127.0.0.1, i.e. localhost of Connect server)

argDefs.name: localPort
argDefs.description: the local source TCP port (default: allocate and return an available port)

argDefs.name: remoteAddress
argDefs.description: the remote destination IP address (default: 127.0.0.1, i.e. localhost of remote CLI server)

actionDefs.name: forwardRemotePort
actionDefs.description: Forward a TCP port from a remote CLI server to a TCP port through the Connect server.

argDefs.name: remoteAddress
argDefs.description: the remote source IP address (default: 127.0.0.1, i.e. localhost of remote CLI server)

argDefs.name: localAddress
argDefs.description: the local destination IP address (default: 127.0.0.1, i.e. localhost of Connect server)

actionDefs.name: openPortForwardingSession
actionDefs.description: Open an SSH port forwarding session.

argDefs.name: host
argDefs.description: the SSH host name or address

argDefs.name: user
argDefs.description: the username for the SSH host

argDefs.name: password
argDefs.description: the password for the SSH host

argDefs.name: options
argDefs.description:
additional SSH options:
ciphers - allowed encryption algorithms
macs - allowed hashing algorithms
debug - true to trace additional debug information

actionDefs.name: openPortForwardingSessionWithCert
actionDefs.description: Open an SSH port forwarding session using public/private key authentication.

argDefs.name: host
argDefs.description: the SSH host name or address

argDefs.name: user
argDefs.description: the username for the SSH host

argDefs.name: privateKey
argDefs.description: the path of the private key file within the project file store or the private key loaded as a byte array

argDefs.name: publicKey
argDefs.description: the path of the public key file within the project file store or the public key loaded as a byte array

argDefs.name: passPhrase
argDefs.description: the passPhrase for private key (default: none)

argDefs.name: options
argDefs.description:
additional SSH options:
ciphers - allowed encryption algorithms
macs - allowed hashing algorithms
debug - true to trace additional debug information

actionDefs.name: generateReport
actionDefs.description: Load a Jasper JRXML report definition.

argDefs.name: parameters
argDefs.description: Record or ECMAScript object containing report parameters

argDefs.name: data
argDefs.description: collection of records to be reported on

argDefs.name: format
argDefs.description: collection of records to be reported on

argDefs.name: path
argDefs.description: path of report output file (relative to Connect server managed file store)

actionDefs.name: loadReportDefinition
actionDefs.description: Load a Jasper JRXML report definition.

argDefs.name: path
argDefs.description: the path of the Jasper JRXML report definition file (relative to Connect server managed file store)

actionDefs.name: sendSMSMessage
actionDefs.description: Send an SMS text message via configured SMS provider.

argDefs.name: to
argDefs.description: the destination telephone number (prefixed by '+' and the country code if outside US/Canada)

actionDefs.name: break
actionDefs.description: Skip to the end of enclosing loop or section.

argDefs.name: label
argDefs.description: the label of the loop or section to end (default: the nearest enclosing loop)

actionDefs.name: clearLastError
actionDefs.description: Clear the last error message and/or code.

actionDefs.name: close
actionDefs.description: Close a closeable resource (e.g. connection or iterator.)

actionDefs.name: comment
actionDefs.description: Comment.

actionDefs.name: continue
actionDefs.description: Go to the top of the enclosing loop

argDefs.name: label
argDefs.description: the label of the loop to continue (default: the nearest enclosing loop)

actionDefs.name: forEach
actionDefs.description: Iterate through each item in a collection.

argDefs.name: label
argDefs.description: The label for the loop. May be referenced by break and continue actions.

argDefs.name: variable
argDefs.description: the variable to assign to an item from the collection at the beginning of each loop iteration

argDefs.name: do
argDefs.description: the actions to perform for each item in the collection

actionDefs.name: getLastErrorCode
actionDefs.description: Get the last error code.

actionDefs.name: getLastErrorMessage
actionDefs.description: Get the last error message.

actionDefs.name: getNext
actionDefs.description: Get the next item in this iterator.

actionDefs.name: hasNext
actionDefs.description: Check if there are more items in this iterator.

actionDefs.name: if
actionDefs.description: Conditionally perform actions.

argDefs.name: then
argDefs.description: the actions to perform if the condition is true

argDefs.name: else
argDefs.description: the actions to perform if the condition is false

actionDefs.name: return
actionDefs.description: End the action and return a value.

argDefs.name: value
argDefs.description: the value to return from the action - may be assigned to the return variable specified by the caller

actionDefs.name: section
actionDefs.description: A way to group multiple actions together.

argDefs.name: label
argDefs.description: the label for the section - may be referenced by break and continue actions

argDefs.name: suppressTrace
argDefs.description: suppress detailed tracing of the actions in the section

actionDefs.name: while
actionDefs.description: Loop while condition is true.

argDefs.name: label
argDefs.description: the label for the loop - may be referenced by break and continue actions

argDefs.name: condition
argDefs.description: the condition to evaluate at the beginning of eash loop iteration

argDefs.name: do
argDefs.description: the actions to perform for each loop iteration
